variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 339 Breather Filter | Replaces the MP Filtri SAP075G4L03A
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 339 Breather Filter is HiFi's replacement to the MP FILTRI SAP075G4L03A. Easy to install and replace, the FS 339 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
